title: Crumbly Quick-Fix Ukrainian Resinous Dough Bake
description: A crumbly and resinous Ukrainian-inspired dessert made with demerara sugar and baked in a wood-fired oven, perfect for a quick keto-friendly fix.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together almond flour, demerara sugar, baking soda, coarse sea salt, and wood-smoked salt.
In a large bowl, cream together unsalted butter and large eggs.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms, then stir in sesame seeds and Korean chili flakes.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Shape the dough into a ball and place it onto a parchment-lined Korean brass bowl.
Bake the dough for 20-25 minutes, or until it is golden brown and fragrant.
Remove the dough from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve warm, topped with a dollop of whipped cream or a sprinkle of powdered sugar if desired.
